title: BTech Mechanical Lateral Entry - Galgotias University
content: NOTE-Classes will be held in the Evening and on Saturdays & Sundays For Lateral Entry: Passed Diploma examination with at least 50% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Sc. Degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks and passed 10+2 examination with Mathematics as a subject. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector. and Minimum of ONE Year Full time / Regular working Experience 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 09 10 11 01 02 03 01 To apply Computer-Aided Engineering (CAE) tools for design and innovation in engineering applications 02 To apply modern manufacturing tools for rapid prototyping in manufacturing applications. For Lateral Entry: Passed Diploma examination with at least 50% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Sc. Degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks and passed 10+2 examination with Mathematics as a subject. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector. and Minimum of ONE Year Full time / Regular working Experience
